ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "second_name" TEXT /* Second name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured, doubtful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity rating of the player */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence rating of the player */,
  "threat" REAL /* Threat rating of the player */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Number of bonuses earned by the player */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* Number of BPS (Bonus Points System) points earned by the player */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* ICT (Influence, Creativity, Threat) index of the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "match_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "goals_per_90" REAL /* Average goals scored per 90 minutes played */,
  "assists_per_90" REAL /* Average assists made per 90 minutes played */,
  "clean_sheets_per_90" REAL /* Average clean sheets kept per 90 minutes played */,
  "yellow_cards_per_90" REAL /* Average yellow cards received per 90 minutes played */,
  "red_cards_per_90" REAL /* Average red cards received per 90 minutes played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fantasy team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fantasy team was last updated */,
  "budget" REAL /* Remaining budget for the fantasy team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Current score of the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_players" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the selection */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "selected_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player was selected for the fantasy team */,
  "price_paid" REAL /* Price paid by the user to select the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-created league */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-created league was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-created league was last updated */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., home win, away win, draw) */,
  "home_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., out, doubt, probable) */,
  "injury_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury started */,
  "estimated_recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of recovery */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was transferred */,
  "old_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was transferred from */,
  "new_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_old_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_new_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
